    <item>
      <title>For the First Time, a Cell Built From Scratch Grows and Divides</title>
      <link>https://www.quantamagazine.org/for-the-first-time-a-cell-built-from-scratch-grows-and-divides-20260701/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.quantamagazine.org/for-the-first-time-a-cell-built-from-scratch-grows-and-divides-20260701/</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 01 Jul 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Synthetic biologists assembled nonliving components inside a membrane and produced a cell-like system that grew, copied DNA, and divided.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>We Need A Way To Prove Personhood Online</title>
      <link>https://www.noemamag.com/we-need-a-way-to-prove-personhood-online/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.noemamag.com/we-need-a-way-to-prove-personhood-online/</guid>
      <pubDate>Tue, 30 Jun 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[AI agents are breaking the old internet assumption that most online actions trace back to an accountable person.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it</title>
      <link>https://www.theverge.com/science/957630/omb-killing-science-budget-grants-research</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.theverge.com/science/957630/omb-killing-science-budget-grants-research</guid>
      <pubDate>Mon, 29 Jun 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[A proposed OMB rule would give political appointees broad authority over research grants, collaborations, conferences, publishing costs, and alignment with presidential priorities.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Albanians Embrace Their ‘Flamingo Revolution’</title>
      <link>https://newlinesmag.com/reportage/albanians-embrace-their-flamingo-revolution/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://newlinesmag.com/reportage/albanians-embrace-their-flamingo-revolution/</guid>
      <pubDate>Wed, 24 Jun 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[Mass protests in Albania are challenging a luxury development project in the Vjosa-Narta Protected Area.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Searching for the Unexpected</title>
      <link>https://thepointmag.com/dialogue/searching-for-the-unexpected/</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://thepointmag.com/dialogue/searching-for-the-unexpected/</guid>
      <pubDate>Mon, 29 Jun 2026 00:00:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <description><![CDATA[A conversation with Carlo Ginzburg about microhistory, marginal voices, archives, chance, and intellectual surprise.]]></description>
      <category>Historical Backfill</category>

items.title: For the First Time, a Cell Built From Scratch Grows and Divides
items.description: Synthetic biologists assembled nonliving components inside a membrane and produced a cell-like system that grew, copied DNA, and divided.

items.description: AI agents are breaking the old internet assumption that most online actions trace back to an accountable person.

items.title: Searching for the Unexpected
